interview_trace.question: Can you describe a time when you had to integrate multiple systems or services to automate a complex business process?
Can you walk me through a specific scenario where you would use a multi-agent workflow to solve a real-world problem?
How would you handle concurrent execution of tasks within the workflow when multiple agents are involved?
Can you walk me through your thought process when deciding how to handle potential failures or errors in the multi-agent workflow?
How do you handle failures or timeouts in a multi-agent workflow, and what tradeoffs do you consider when implementing retry logic or fallback strategies?
